시편 95:1.content: Oh come, let’s sing to Yahweh. Let’s shout aloud to the rock of our salvation!

시편 95:2.content: Let’s come before his presence with thanksgiving. Let’s extol him with songs!

시편 95:3.content: For Yahweh is a great God, a great King above all gods.

시편 95:4.content: In his hand are the deep places of the earth. The heights of the mountains are also his.

시편 95:5.content: The sea is his, and he made it. His hands formed the dry land.

시편 95:6.content: Oh come, let’s worship and bow down. Let’s kneel before Yahweh, our Maker,

시편 95:7.content: for he is our God. We are the people of his pasture, and the sheep in his care. Today, oh that you would hear his voice!

시편 95:8.content: Don’t harden your heart, as at Meribah, as in the day of Massah in the wilderness,

시편 95:9.content: when your fathers tempted me, tested me, and saw my work.

시편 95:10.content: Forty long years I was grieved with that generation, and said, “It is a people that errs in their heart. They have not known my ways.”

시편 95:11.content: Therefore I swore in my wrath, “They won’t enter into my rest.”
